# Real-Audio Validation Result Template

Copy this template for each clip and fill in the fields. Keep filled-in copies
local only (under `recordings/`); do not commit them. The values below are
placeholders that illustrate the expected format.

## Pre-registered (before producing any output)

- sample_id: 2026-06-20-normal-clean
- category: normal
- noise_condition: clean
- intended_loudness: normal
- intended_pace: normal
- expressivity: normal
- expected_pause_count: 2
- expected_recommendation: wait

## Objective anchors

- recorded_seconds: 8.4
- script_word_count: 21
- words_per_minute: 150.0
- capture_conditions: built-in microphone, ~30 cm, default input gain

## Result (after producing the tool output)

- produced_loudness: <fill in>
- produced_pace: <fill in>
- produced_pause_count: <fill in>
- produced_recommendation: <fill in>
- match: <yes / no>
- notes: <free text>
